offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, poor tracking of procurement spend causes missed discounts. We provide a procurement spend tracker instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking procurement spend and managing contract renewals.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on procurement
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Share insights in Amazon seller community forums
try_it: Let users try Expense categorization and Budget forecasting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Develop a demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing procurement data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
